title: Rebuild of Eva 20 DVD
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild of Eva 2.0 DVD Post by RamielRowe » Tue Oct 27, 2009 9:30 pm Yo, this is my first post here, so I'd like to introduce myself first. I've been an avid Eva fan for 7 years or so. I loved the series and I think the Rebuild is amazing. Anyways, back to my question. Does anyone know if a date has been announced for a release of the 2.0 DVD?

[]: Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Tue Oct 27, 2009 9:36 pm Well my guess is late next year, since 2.0 came out this summer, and 1.0's dvd in dub at least, wont be out till november. other then that I dont think theres a set release date yet.

[]: Post by RamielRowe » Tue Oct 27, 2009 9:43 pm I really hope not, if I remember correctly the first dvd of RoE 1.0 came out about 6 months after the release. I hope they do something like a holiday release or something in December.

[]: Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Tue Oct 27, 2009 10:20 pm I'm wondering myself if anyone knows the release date of the Japanese DVD.

[]: Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Oct 27, 2009 10:20 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: Well my guess is late next year, since 2.0 came out this summer, and 1.0's dvd in dub at least, wont be out till november. other then that I dont think theres a set release date yet.

[]: Post by RamielRowe » Tue Oct 27, 2009 10:53 pm If you mean the R1 dvd release for 2.0 then yes you are correct. But for those that can import the R2 Japanese 2.0 dvd then i think what you said is incorrect.

[]: Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Oct 27, 2009 11:00 pm RamielRowe wrote: If you mean the R1 dvd release for 2.0 then yes you are correct. But for those that can import the R2 Japanese 2.0 dvd then i think what you said is incorrect.

[]: Post by Guyver Spawn » Tue Oct 27, 2009 11:09 pm Funimation has been know to dub movies rather fast (They release DBZ Movies 10 and 11 both in the same year back in 2005). I would say around Q4 2010 when we will see 2.0 here in the USA. I hear that they dub 1.0 back in late 2008 IIRC? I would not be surprise if their working on the movie right now.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Oct 27, 2009 11:22 pm If it has the exact same period from theatrical release to DVD the Region 2 release of 2.0 should be mid-February 2010. As for Region 1, I'm assuming that Funimation entered into negotiations and unless the gods should get angry they own or will own the 2.0 rights pretty soon. And they do dub fast (there was a comment on their website or something about having finished the dub back in late 2008....and they just kinda sat on the film for 11 months...). All I can say is if I were a key member at Funimation (which I'm not) the best business plan would be to try and get 2.0 out on DVD/BluRay exactly one year after the first release of 1.0, meaning November 2010. They could bring out 1.11 in Spring 2010 and attach a trailer for their Fall release. And hey, if the God's were really in their favor 3.0 would come out Summer 2010 meaning they could release it November 2011. ....But of course I have no say.

[]: Post by Guyver Spawn » Tue Oct 27, 2009 11:40 pm They could bring out 1.11 in Spring 2010 and attach a trailer for their Fall release.

[]: Post by Evangelion » Wed Oct 28, 2009 12:10 am I'm guessing we won't hear about a DVD release until at least early next year, or December if we are lucky! *crosses fingers*

[]: Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Oct 28, 2009 2:35 pm I think by Q1 2010 we will see some info on 2.0 coming to the USA.

[]: Post by Ornette » Mon Nov 02, 2009 7:40 pm not entirely related to OP's question, but a mildly interesting article. http://www.omonomono.com/2009/11/02/funimations-figures-reading-between-eva-films/

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 02, 2009 7:45 pm Like I said in several other threads, the 1.0 dub has Misato at the end of the Next Time Preview say "You can not advance" is "coming soon", which IMO implies Funi has the rights to it or ALL the Rebuild films, but who knows. At the very least, my guess is 2.0 will be released on DVD in Japan either Winter (December??)/Spring 2010 and maybe the earliest 2.0 is out in the states or the rest of the world is Fall/Winter 2010. /Speculation

[]: Post by Lagann » Wed Nov 04, 2009 3:51 pm This site seems to believe that 2.0 is coming out sometime this holiday season check the first post here http://translate.google.com/translate?hl=en&sl=ja&tl=en&u=http%3A%2F%2Fevangeliwon.blog107.fc2.com%2F

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Dec 08, 2009 3:29 am Nothing's certain but I'm just gonna throw this little hypothesis out there. The Evangelion 2.0 movie homepage which has done nothing since the film's release but shill out crap like Evangelion shoes and calender's has SUDDENLY gone down to be "worked on" and will be (for the most part, some info areas are still accessible) offline from now until December 10th. Now, like I said, don't get your hopes up but Evangelion 1.0 was released in Sept '07 and had a home video release announcement and set date in Jan. '08. That's about a window of 5 months. Evangelion 2.0 came out at the end of June and we're now a little over 5 months since the film's release. Hypothetically speaking there should be announcement within the next few weeks about a home video release. So to me, the only reason I can see them putting their primarily useless website offline for 48 hours is because they've got some kind've big announcement coming. I only see 3 outcomes. 1. It's a title and release date for Evangelion 3.0 (unlikely since they still have at least 4 home video releases of 2.0 to milk) 2. The Release date of 2.0 on home video- DVD/BluRay/etc is announced. (Highly probable) 3. Nothing happens and I come off looking like a jackass for giving people hope. Let's see what happens!

[]: Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Dec 08, 2009 9:34 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: So to me, the only reason I can see them putting their primarily useless website offline for 48 hours is because they've got some kind've big announcement coming. I only see 3 outcomes. 1. It's a title and release date for Evangelion 3.0 (unlikely since they still have at least 4 home video releases of 2.0 to milk) 2. The Release date of 2.0 on home video- DVD/BluRay/etc is announced. (Highly probable) 3. Nothing happens and I come off looking like a jackass for giving people hope. Let's see what happens!

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 08, 2009 11:30 am 1.11 blu-ray had no subs just fyi. But that's interesting news there, guess we'll see what happens. I checked and Eva's offical site does seem down. Also, I don't remember seeing that large text notice there before. Let's hope there's news of a good quality possibly added scenes DVD/Blu-Ray on the way (2.22 or whatever the hell) instead of a somewhat pointless (comparing to R2 1.01's problems) 2.02 release.

[]: Post by EdZ » Tue Dec 08, 2009 5:48 pm The site looks like it's back to normal again. No sign of a 2.0 release date that I can find. The site and blog list a "Maintenance period" for 12pm 8th - 12pm 10th December.

[]: Post by Heromaster111 » Thu Dec 10, 2009 4:42 am What is the greyed out tab that says Coming Soon when you scroll over it for?
